steps.title: Find the base area
steps.content:
Each base is a rectangle with length $17$ inches and width $9$ inches, so the base area is
$$
17 \cdot 9 = 153
$$

steps.title: Divide the volume
steps.content: For a right rectangular prism, volume equals base area times height. $$ 2{,}448=153h $$ $$ h=\frac{2{,}448}{153}=16 $$ The answer is A.
